columns.description: Column metadata for the result set

rows.description: Result rows from the query (may be limited by the tool's default row limit)

appliedLimit.description: Effective preview limit applied to this response

hasMore.description: True when additional rows matched but were not returned in this preview

truncated.description: True when the response was truncated to the applied preview limit

connectionId.description: Effective connection profile ID used for this query

code.description: Machine-parseable code, e.g., QUERY_TIMEOUT, NET_UNREACHABLE, AUTH_FAILED, SQL_ERROR, VALIDATION_ERROR
